text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
75 
MDCR_DIB_AWD_CD 
LABEL: 
Medicare — SSA Disability Insurance Benefit Award Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the disability insurance benefits (DIB) award code from the Social Security 
Administration (SSA). 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS SSA tables 
VALUES: 
A = Health Insurance/Supplemental Medical Insurance (HI/SMI) Entitlement Based Upon Disability on 
Another Claim Number 
C = Retirement Insurance
